title: Self hosting the modern AI stack could be the way forward
abstract: Self-hosting the modern AI stack might just be your future direction. Imagine building your own AI lab like constructing a cabin in the woods—both eco-friendly and highly customizable. Break free from the constraints of big tech APIs and take control with your very own setup, unlocking new cutting-edge technologies.
abstract_zh: Self hosting the modern AI stack 可能就是你未来的大方向！想象一下，你可以像自己建小木屋一样搭建自己的AI实验室，不仅环保还能随心定制。别再被大厂的接口束缚了，自己动手丰衣足食，解锁更多黑科技吧！
